news.summary: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".

news.headline: Ousmane Dembélé named player of the year in France for second straight year
news.summary: Paris Saint-Germain forward Ousmane Dembélé is only the fifth player to win the trophy in consecutive years, despite a difficult season.

news.headline: How many ride-hailing permits should Hong Kong allow? It depends on who you ask
news.summary:
Hong Kong taxi industry leaders and Uber have both voiced concerns over a looming quota for ride-hailing vehicles, even as transport authorities promised to consult stakeholders before settling on a figure.

news.headline: Former Hostage Calls on All of Israel’s Government to Resign
news.summary: Rom Braslavski, who said he had endured starvation, torture and sexual abuse during two-year captivity, demanded that members “take responsibility and get out of our lives.”
